input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Denali Labs (conf=0.55). AVOID aggressive tone. Expected phrasing tier: inquiry.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'aggressive' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-016] Inquiry tier. Aggressive FOMO language in outreach.
